HGSS.504.0000:
One of the Elite Four used to be
the Leader of Fuchsia’s Gym.
HGSS.504.0001:
Koga’s daughter succeeded him as
the Gym Leader after he joined\r
the Elite Four.
HGSS.504.0002:
The Safari Zone wasn’t open
for a while.\f
Then it moved to Johto before
I knew it.\r
It’s sad...\f
It was this city’s main attraction.
HGSS.504.0003:
Fuchsia City
Happening and Passing City
HGSS.504.0004:
Fuchsia City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Janine\r
The Poisonous Ninja Master
HGSS.504.0005:
There’s a notice here...\f
The Safari Zone is closed.\r
Instead, we have Pal Park.
HGSS.504.0006: Home of the Pal Park Warden
HGSS.504.0007:
Shard de Berry!
Shard de Berry!\f
Yah, yah!
I trade Berry for Shard.\f
If ya bring me some Shards,
I will give ya three Berries, yah!\f
